description: Testing menu visibility based on user roles, login status, and page context

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check NOT Available menu
+ Based on Role and Permisson [base on requirement]
+ Based on Login/Not Login session [base on requirement]
+ Based on spec
expected_result:
+ Main menu is NOT available for specific Role and Permission
+ Main menu is NOT available if user has already login/Not login
+ Main menu is NOT available on some screens

description: Testing menu functionality including visual elements, ordering, styling, tooltips, and navigation

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check name, icon ... in menu
+ Main menu
+ Single - level menu
+ Multi - level menu
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check order of menu 
+ Main menu
+ Single - level menu
+ Multi - level menu
expected_result:
Menu list displays with correct order
[base on requirement]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check border of main menu/single - level menu/multi-level menu when

+ Item name = Min characters
+ Item name = Max characters
expected_result: Border of each menu item fits with its text

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check menu style when hovering mouse over the menu 

+ Main menu
+ Single - level menu
+ Multi - level menu
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check tooltip displays when hovering mouse over the menu

+ Tooltip = [Required item]
+ Tooltip = NULL [Not required tooltip] 
+ Tooltip = Max length -1
+ Tooltip = Max length
+ Tooltip = Min length
+ Tooltip = Min length + 1
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed
+ Position
+ Content
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check arrow icon in Multil - level menu
+ DOWN arrow icon
+ UP arrow icon
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check open an item in menu
+ Main menu
+ Single - level menu
+ Multi - level menu
expected_result:
+ Appropriate page displays when open optional item in menu
+ In global menu, the opening menu is displayed correctly as designed: format, highlight...

test_view_points.viewpoint: Additional menu items: Search menu, Translate menu
expected_result:
+ Confirm Search menu display correctly as designed
+ User can use Search bar in Global navigation
